text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The race will be starting soon. I shall never grow
tired of tasting this excitement.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My previous result was pitiful, but I've put it out
of mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've done all I can to prepare. All that's left is to
unleash my full power.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I shall be on my way then. I'll see you once
the race has concluded.
